data.text:
Committed. Changes:
- `text-3xl font-semibold` → `text-headline-lg font-headline-lg` (drain count)
- `text-sm` → `text-body-sm` (all 5 occurrences across panel, form, table)
- Remove worker button: `text-status-failed` → `text-error dark:text-dark-error`
- `text-lever` was already gone (fixed in prior bead 125c770e); ID column already uses `text-accent-lever dark:text-dark-accent-lever`

`bun run check` reports 0 errors.
